rationale: Educ. Code §45.351 governs applicability of a county equalization tax subchapter based on population and prior tax adoption. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote:
This subchapter applies only to a county:
(1) with a population of more than 40,000 but less than 55,000; and
(2) for which a county equalization tax was adopted under former Chapter 18 of this code, as that chapter existed on May 1, 1995, and continues in effect under Section 11.301.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts in this rule.
